task_completion.description: Open the draft keynote document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the file 'keynote_draft.odt'.
The ruler or Page Style dialog shows 2.0-inch margins, or the document text is visibly constrained to a narrow column in the center of the page.

task_completion.description: Apply 18pt font size and double spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font size dropdown shows '18', the text appears significantly larger, and there is visible double spacing (large vertical gaps) between lines of text.
The text 'EMBARGOED DRAFT' is visible in the footer area at the bottom of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Format bracketed stage cues with Bold and Italic styling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Bracketed text such as '[Pause for applause]' or '[Look at camera]' is visibly styled with both Bold and Italic formatting.
Visible page breaks in the document, likely placed before 'SECTION:' markers, showing text forced to the top of a new page with empty space at the bottom of the previous page.
The save icon is clicked, a save dialog is confirmed, or the window title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor's graphical interface to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer menus, dialogs, and toolbars rather than terminal commands or python scripts modifying the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Formatting features were used rather than text manipulation workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: Margins, spacing, and page breaks are applied using layout settings/tools, not by repeatedly typing spaces or the Enter key.

integrity.description: The original speech content was preserved.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text remains the JFK Rice University speech excerpt and was not replaced by a dummy file or copy-pasted generic text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is '/home/ga/Documents/keynote_draft.odt'. Required formatting: 2.0-inch margins, 18pt font size, double spacing, and a footer with exactly 'EMBARGOED DRAFT'. There are 10 bracketed stage cues (e.g., '[Pause for applause]', '[Look at camera]', '[Gesture with right hand]') that must be formatted as both Bold and Italic. Manual page breaks should be inserted, logically aligning with the 3 section markers ('SECTION: The New Ocean', 'SECTION: The Choice', 'SECTION: The Future').
